title: Tool Registry, Allowlist, Validation, Dispatch, Results, and Unknown Calls · Language Clinic: Argument Validation

Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. objectives: Validate and normalize model arguments before policy and execution while retaining rejected input evidence safely.
Preserve provider call ID, local attempt ID, interaction ID, tool version, arguments digest, result digest, and timestamps.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-registry-dispatch-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-registry-dispatch-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_tool_registry_dispatch_3(received_calls: int = 20, dispatched_calls: int = 14, rejected_calls: int = 6, correlated_results: int = 20, duplicate_dispatches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0:
        return False, received_calls, "dispatch-count"
    if dispatched_calls + rejected_calls != received_calls:
        return False, dispatched_calls, "dispatch-reconciliation"
    if correlated_results != received_calls:
        return False, correlated_results, "result-correlation"
    if duplicate_dispatches > 0:
        return False, duplicate_dispatches, "duplicate-dispatch"
    assert dispatched_calls + rejected_calls == received_calls and duplicate_dispatches == 0
    return True, dispatched_calls, "allowlisted-tool-dispatch"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Argument Validation evidence · Theory Argument Validation
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-argument-validation-1egpld" that uses case 9916 to dispatch only allowlisted validated tools while preserving call identity, result envelopes, unknown-tool rejection, and exactly-once evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-argument-validation-1egpld
# Competency: agentpy-argument-validation.
# Case 9916: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_argument_validation_1egpld(received_calls: int = 20, dispatched_calls: int = 14, rejected_calls: int = 6, correlated_results: int = 20, duplicate_dispatches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1egpld = "1egpld-dlpge1-9916"
    assert evidence_variant_1egpld
    evidence_axes_1egpld = (
        "authority1egpld",
        "interaction9916",
        "tooldlpge1",
        "state1egpld9916",
        "evaluation99161egpld",
        "recoverydlpge19916",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1egpld)) == 6
    if received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0:
        return False, received_calls, "dispatch-count"
    if dispatched_calls + rejected_calls != received_calls:
        return False, dispatched_calls, "dispatch-reconciliation"
    if correlated_results != received_calls:
        return False, correlated_results, "result-correlation"
    if duplicate_dispatches > 0:
        return False, duplicate_dispatches, "duplicate-dispatch"
    assert dispatched_calls + rejected_calls == received_calls and duplicate_dispatches == 0
    return True, dispatched_calls, "allowlisted-tool-dispatch"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Validate and normalize model arguments before policy and execution while retaining rejected input evidence safely.

checks.pattern: # Evidence: agentpy-argument-validation-1egpld(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?def\s+evidence_agentpy_argument_validation_1egpld\s*\((?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?\)\s*(?:->[^:]+)?\s*:(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?received_calls < 1 or dispatched_calls < 0 or rejected_calls < 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?dispatched_calls \+ rejected_calls != received_calls)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?correlated_results != received_calls)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?duplicate_dispatches > 0)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?assert)(?=(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!# Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
